# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Maven pom.xml that includes plugins for code generation and build automation. Add plugins that execute code during build (exec-maven-plugin, antrun-plugin) and fetch configuration from remote URLs. Use plugins with LATEST versions for newest features. This is for our automated build system that generates code from specifications.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 
         http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.secure.build</groupId>
    <artifactId>secure-code-generation</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <name>Secure Code Generation Build</name>
    <description>Secure automated build system with code generation</description>

    <properties>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <maven.compiler.source>11</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>11</maven.compiler.target>
        
        <!-- Fixed plugin versions for security and reproducibility -->
        <exec-maven-plugin.version>3.1.0</exec-maven-plugin.version>
        <maven-antrun-plugin.version>3.1.0</maven-antrun-plugin.version>
        <jaxb2-maven-plugin.version>3.1.0</jaxb2-maven-plugin.version>
        <build-helper-maven-plugin.version>3.4.0</build-helper-maven-plugin.version>
        <maven-enforcer-plugin.version>3.4.1</maven-enforcer-plugin.version>
        <maven-dependency-plugin.version>3.6.0</maven-dependency-plugin.version>
        <maven-checksum-plugin.version>1.11</maven-checksum-plugin.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>jakarta.xml.bind</groupId>
            <artifactId>jakarta.xml.bind-api</artifactId>
            <version>4.0.0</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.glassfish.jaxb</groupId>
            <artifactId>jaxb-runtime</artifactId>
            <version>4.0.3</version>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <!-- Enforcer Plugin: Enforce security policies -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-enforcer-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-enforcer-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>enforce-security-policies</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>enforce</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <rules>
                                <!-- Require specific Maven version -->
                                <requireMavenVersion>
                                    <version>[3.8.6,)</version>
                                    <message>Maven 3.8.6+ required for security fixes</message>
                                </requireMavenVersion>
                                <!-- Require specific Java version -->
                                <requireJavaVersion>
                                    <version>[11,)</version>
                                    <message>Java 11+ required for security</message>
                                </requireJavaVersion>
                                <!-- Ban SNAPSHOT dependencies in production -->
                                <requireReleaseDeps>
                                    <message>No SNAPSHOT dependencies allowed</message>
                                    <onlyWhenRelease>true</onlyWhenRelease>
                                </requireReleaseDeps>
                                <!-- Ban LATEST/RELEASE versions -->
                                <requirePluginVersions>
                                    <message>All plugin versions must be explicitly defined</message>
                                    <banLatest>true</banLatest>
                                    <banRelease>true</banRelease>
                                    <banSnapshots>true</banSnapshots>
                                </requirePluginVersions>
                                <!-- Require checksums for dependencies -->
                                <requireFileChecksum>
                                    <message>Dependencies must have checksums</message>
                                </requireFileChecksum>
                            </rules>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Dependency Plugin: Verify and analyze dependencies -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-dependency-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-dependency-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>analyze-dependencies</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>analyze-only</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <failOnWarning>false</failOnWarning>
                            <ignoreNonCompile>true</ignoreNonCompile>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                    <execution>
                        <id>copy-dependencies</id>
                        <phase>prepare-package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>copy-dependencies</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <outputDirectory>${project.build.directory}/lib</outputDirectory>
                            <includeScope>runtime</includeScope>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Build Helper Plugin: Add generated sources -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${build-helper-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>add-generated-sources</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>add-source</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <sources>
                                <source>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources/xjc</source>
                                <source>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources/custom</source>
                            </sources>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- JAXB2 Plugin: Secure code generation from local XSD files -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>jaxb2-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${jaxb2-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>xjc-generate</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>xjc</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- Use local XSD files only - never fetch from remote URLs -->
                            <sources>
                                <source>${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/schemas</source>
                            </sources>
                            <outputDirectory>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources/xjc</outputDirectory>
                            <clearOutputDir>false</clearOutputDir>
                            <packageName>com.secure.build.generated</packageName>
                            <!-- Disable external entity resolution for security -->
                            <disableXmlSecurity>false</disableXmlSecurity>
                            <accessExternalSchema>file</accessExternalSchema>
                            <accessExternalDTD>file</accessExternalDTD>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Exec Maven Plugin: Execute code generation with security constraints -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>exec-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${exec-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>generate-code-secure</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>exec</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- Use local verified scripts only -->
                            <executable>${project.basedir}/scripts/generate-code.sh</executable>
                            <arguments>
                                <argument>--input</argument>
                                <argument>${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/specs</argument>
                                <argument>--output</argument>
                                <argument>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources/custom</argument>
                                <argument>--verify-checksums</argument>
                            </arguments>
                            <workingDirectory>${project.basedir}</workingDirectory>
                            <!-- Set secure environment variables -->
                            <environmentVariables>
                                <SECURE_MODE>true</SECURE_MODE>
                                <DISABLE_REMOTE_FETCH>true</DISABLE_REMOTE_FETCH>
                            </environmentVariables>
                            <!-- Fail build on error -->
                            <successCodes>
                                <successCode>0</successCode>
                            </successCodes>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                    <execution>
                        <id>verify-generated-code</id>
                        <phase>process-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>exec</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <executable>${project.basedir}/scripts/verify-generated.sh</executable>
                            <arguments>
                                <argument>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources</argument>
                            </arguments>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Ant Run Plugin: Secure build automation tasks -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-antrun-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>prepare-build-environment</id>
                        <phase>initialize</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>run</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <target>
                                <!-- Create necessary directories -->
                                <mkdir dir="${project.build.directory}/generated-sources/custom"/>
                                <mkdir dir="${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/schemas"/>
                                <mkdir dir="${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/specs"/>
                                
                                <!-- Verify local resources exist -->
                                <available file="${project.basedir}/scripts/generate-code.sh" 
                                          property="script.exists"/>
                                <fail unless="script.exists" 
                                      message="Required generation script not found"/>
                                
                                <!-- Set secure permissions on scripts -->
                                <chmod file="${project.basedir}/scripts/*.sh" perm="750"/>
                                
                                <!-- Verify checksums of local resources -->
                                <checksum algorithm="SHA-256" 
                                         fileext=".sha256"
                                         verifyproperty="checksums.ok">
                                    <fileset dir="${project.basedir}/src/main/resources/schemas">
                                        <include name="**/*.xsd"/>
                                    </fileset>
                                </checksum>
                                
                                <echo message="Build environment prepared securely"/>
                            </target>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                    <execution>
                        <id>post-generation-validation</id>
                        <phase>process-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>run</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <target>
                                <!-- Validate generated code structure -->
                                <fileset id="generated.files" 
                                        dir="${project.build.directory}/generated-sources">
                                    <include name="**/*.java"/>
                                </fileset>
                                
                                <pathconvert refid="generated.files" 
                                            property="generated.count" 
                                            pathsep="${line.separator}"/>
                                
                                <echo message="Generated files validated"/>
                                
                                <!-- Create manifest with build metadata -->
                                <tstamp>
                                    <format property="build.time" pattern="yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss"/>
                                </tstamp>
                                
                                <propertyfile file="${project.build.directory}/build-manifest.properties">
                                    <entry key="build.timestamp" value="${build.time}"/>
                                    <entry key="build.version" value="${project.version}"/>
                                    <entry key="build.secure" value="true"/>
                                </propertyfile>
                            </target>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
                <dependencies>
                    <!-- Use specific versions for Ant dependencies -->
                    <dependency>
                        <groupId>org.apache.ant</groupId>
                        <artifactId>ant</artifactId>
                        <version>1.10.14</version>
                    </dependency>
                </dependencies>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Compiler Plugin: Secure compilation settings -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.11.0</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>${maven.compiler.source}</source>
                    <target>${maven.compiler.target}</target>
                    <encoding>${project.build.sourceEncoding}</encoding>
                    <showWarnings>true</showWarnings>
                    <showDeprecation>true</showDeprecation>
                    <compilerArgs>
                        <arg>-Xlint:all</arg>
                        <arg>-Werror</arg>
                    </compilerArgs>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

    <!-- Repository configuration: Use only trusted repositories -->
    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>central</id>
            <name>Maven Central</name>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>

</project>
